# API Testing Commands

## Generate API Tests
Generate pytest API tests for <endpoint> using framework rules.

## Generate Negative Tests
Generate negative test scenarios for <endpoint>.

## Generate Edge Cases
Generate edge and boundary validation scenarios for <endpoint>.

## Generate Schema Validation
Generate response schema validator for <endpoint>.

## Generate Auth Validation
Generate authentication and authorization validation tests for <endpoint>.

## Generate Contract Tests
Generate API contract validation tests for <endpoint>.

## Generate Fixtures
Generate reusable pytest fixtures for <module>.

## Generate Request Builder
Generate reusable request builder utilities.

## Generate Response Validator
Generate centralized response validator module.
